freeze_gate.purpose: Safety gate linked to non-completed cards after graph creation; complete this gate only when intentionally starting dispatch.
freeze_gate.title: COORD: freeze Legion GA queue until coordinator starts dispatch

graph_creation_notes: The gateway dispatcher completed the original COORD.START gate during graph creation and briefly promoted/claimed milestone gates before all dependency links were present.
A replacement COORD.FREEZE gate (t_6db273ba) was created and linked to non-completed cards; ready/running count verified as zero after recovery.
P1.F2.T1 was already completed in the current implementation batch; its temporary gating parents were removed so the card could be marked done while preserving its child link to the M1 gate.

root_gate.title: COORD: start Legion GA execution queue
